title: Scorched Guns 2: Flintlocks
description: A standalone lightweight version of Scorched Guns 2, only with flintlocks and muskets from the pirate era.
body:
# SCORCHED GUNS 2: Flintlocks

This is a specked down lightweight version of the incredible [SCORCHED GUN 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2) Mod, isolating the first tier of guns fitting the pirate era. Namely the Flintlock, Handcannon, Musket and Blunderbuss. 

![Flintlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3330cfc359ab0869475c8e81b3b085b96fda2218.png)
![Musket with Wooden Stock and Bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93846606bc64cd74acd6c0ba92b62f3b269cd0d8.png)

To fit the primitive era of guns, modern guns and dependencies to the Create Mod have been cut, as well as the fabric-themed mobs. The guns prsent are still crafted in the Gun Bench and can be hung up on the Gun Shelf. Ammunition can be crafted from pebbles gained from gravel and gunpowder dust. In the Special Ammo Box you can store your ammunition and carry it in the Inventory or Curios Belt Slot. 

Requires [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework). Since it's a specked down version of Scorched Guns 2, no items are new, but the same, it SHOULD NOT be loaded alongside SCGUNS, since it shares the same modid.

Check out the full Scorched Guns 2 Mod by [ribs](https://modrinth.com/user/ribss498).
